title: 試験：フラッシュプラン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Eishin Flash comes up to me after our
training session.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: There is something I'd like to talk to you about.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You have been rather unfocused for the past five
days. Is it possible you're feeling fatigued?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, I have been putting in a lot
of overtime lately.
choice_data_list: You hit the nail on the head.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I see. If I may make a suggestion...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Why don't I create the plan for our next training
session?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That way, you could use the time normally
occupied by schedule planning to rest instead.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking about revising my solo training
lessons anyway.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I believe this would be a win-win arrangement.
What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I really appreciate her offer, but still, making
training plans is my job as a trainer. Hm... What
should I say?
choice_data_list: You know what? Go for it!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Very well then.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I shall bring a detailed training plan to your office
at 8:00 a.m. tomorrow morning.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: This booklet contains today's training plan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Taking my current abilities into account, I
concluded that focusing on speed training would
lead to optimal results.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I included a detailed timetable as well. What do
you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are a few details I would change, but it's
clear she put a ton of effort into this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Taking my current abilities into account, I
concluded that focusing on stamina training
would lead to optimal results.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I included a detailed timetable as well. What do
you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are a few details I would change, but it's
clear she put a ton of effort into this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Taking my current abilities into account, I
concluded that focusing on power training would
lead to optimal results.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I included a detailed timetable as well. What do
you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are a few details I would change, but it's
clear she put a ton of effort into this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Taking my current abilities into account, I
concluded that focusing on guts training would
lead to optimal results.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I included a detailed timetable as well. What do
you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are a few details I would change, but it's
clear she put a ton of effort into this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Taking my current abilities into account, I
concluded that focusing on increasing my
knowledge would lead to optimal results.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I included a detailed timetable as well. What do
you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are a few details I would change, but it's
clear she put a ton of effort into this.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you say so, then there must be nothing to worry
about.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Very well. We can carry on our training sessions
as usual, then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash never really brings up the idea of
creating her own training sessions again after
that.
